message:
feat(checkpoint): capture session-selected pane ID for accurate active pane restoration

Previously, checkpoint capture relied on tmux's pane_active flag which
only reflects the active pane within a single window. When a session has
multiple windows, the pane that was actually focused (the session's
selected pane) might differ from the pane_active pane in the first
window.

- Add getSessionActivePaneID() that queries tmux display-message for
  the session's selected #{pane_id}
- In captureSessionState, look up the selected pane ID after collecting
  all pane states and override activeIndex to match, falling back to
  pane_active on error
- Add incremental checkpoint and restore improvements
- Add test: captureSessionState_UsesSessionSelectedPaneAcrossWindows
  verifying cross-window active pane capture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
